snippet.title: 2 Bodies Found In Portmore What The Streets Are Saying
snippet.description:
According to news out of Jamaica, a female and a male were found in Portmore and many questions still surround the findings as to what really happened to them. In this video we talk about what the media is saying as we read from Jamaica star, Jamaica observer, Jamaica gleaner news and we talk about what the streets are saying as well as our own commentary and what we have to say. Dont forget to like, comment, share, subscribe and click the bell to be notified when new videos are upload to SOUFLOTV.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Tessica Brown’s Gorilla Glue Hair Nightmare Fixed by Surgeon
snippet.description: Tessica Brown earned national notoriety for coating her hair with Gorilla Glue spray after running out of hairspray. She tried washing it out with oils and shampoo and even went to the emergency room, but nothing worked. Her pleas for help went viral on TikTok. That’s when Beverly Hills plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng stepped in to help. Brown flew from her home in Louisiana to Los Angeles, where she underwent a procedure to dissolve the glue under light anesthesia.
tags: woman with gorilla glue in hair

snippet.title: Donald Trump Jr Defends Ted Cruz Amid Vacation Fallout
snippet.description:
The weekend is finally here, freezing temperatures are sweeping the USA, Ted Cruz is laying low amid the fallout from his Mexican vacation and Donald Trump Jr. came to his defense, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick might win the award for dumbest Texas politician after his comments about windmills and the Green New Deal, the USA has finally rejoined the Paris Climate Accord, scientists have successfully cloned a black footed ferret, two young women were busted for dressing up as old ladies to get the vaccine, a new line of Karen dolls, and much to Jimmy’s dismay – his wife Molly gives away his most cherished possessions in a new game called “Win Jimmy’s Crap!”

SUBSCRIBE to get the latest #Kimmel: http://bit.ly/JKLSubscribe

Watch Mean Tweets: http://bit.ly/KimmelMT10

Connect with Jimmy Kimmel Live Online:

Visit the Jimmy Kimmel Live WEBSITE: http://bit.ly/JKLWebsite

About Jimmy Kimmel Live:

Jimmy Kimmel serves as host and executive producer of Emmy®-nominated “Jimmy Kimmel Live!,” ABC’s late-night talk show. “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” is well known for its huge viral video successes, with over 11 billion views and more than 15 million subscribers on the show’s YouTube channel. Some of Kimmel’s most popular comedy bits include “Celebrities Read Mean Tweets,” “Lie Witness News,” “Unnecessary Censorship,” “Halloween Candy YouTube Challenge,” and music videos like “I (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.”

snippet.title: Atlético de Madrid 0-1 Chelsea. CHILENA, VAR y GOLAZO de Olivier Giroud. | Champions League
snippet.description: En la UEFA Champions League, el Chelsea sorprendió al Atlético de Madrid 1-0 con un golazo de chilena de Olivier Giroud. Los ingleses se llevaron el partido de ida de los octavos de final ante un equipo del Cholo Simeone que tendrá que ir a Stamford Bridge por la victoria. Luego de que el árbitro revisara la jugada, el VAR convalidó el gol y así la valiosa victoria de los de Tuchel. #ChampionsLeague | Atletico de Madrid vs Chelsea | Atletico Madrid vs Chelsea | Liga de campeones

snippet.title: Tessica Brown Tears Up After Surgery to Remove Gorilla Glue From Her Hair
snippet.description:
Tessica Brown, who went viral after using Gorilla Glue as hairspray, flew to Los Angeles, where plastic surgeon Dr. Michael Obeng removed the glue free of charge. The 40-year-old mom of five gets emotional after the procedure, running her fingers through her freed hair for the first time in weeks.

snippet.title: TikToker Who Used Gorilla Glue in Hair Says ER Couldn’t Help
snippet.description: After running out of hairspray, a Louisiana woman coated her hair with Gorilla Glue spray, a strong adhesive normally used to bond materials like metal, wood and stone. Tessica Brown went viral on social media after explaining the sticky situation and the regret that followed. Brown spoke to Inside Edition about her struggle to try and remove it. She tried baby oil, cooking oil and olive oil to try and remove the glue, but nothing worked. So she sought medical treatment at her local emergency room in Louisiana, but couldn’t tolerate the burning of the acetone wipes they gave her.

snippet.description:
WITCH BIRD (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 300)

This is a documentary about the Mark Angel Family, So we just hit episode 300 on Mark Angel Comedy! 

This has got us so excited looking at how far we have gone in putting smiles on the faces of people so we decided that showing you all the real life of the Mark Angel Family would be a great, gratifying, and exciting idea, and here we are!

In this video, you will learn about everything you need to know about the Mark Angel Family, from what they eat to where they live and how they live! 

So sit back and relax and enjoy, and when you are done watching, do not forget to leave a comment about what you think of the life of the Mark Angel Family and also share the video with your family and friends so they could also watch, enjoy and share their takes.


Please don't forget to subscribe to Mark Angel Comedy Official YouTube Channel and turn on NOTIFICATION:
http://goo.gl/gnzgW3
http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy
GOD BLESS YOU, WE LOVE YOU. Enjoy!

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: Ted Cruz Heads to Sunny Cancun While Winter Storm Cripples Texas
snippet.description:
Senator Ted Cruz decided to hop on a plane to Cancun with his family for a vacation while fellow Texans are freezing and without power, pictures of him at the airport went viral and backlash was so severe that he had no choice but to immediately book a flight home, United Airlines put out a new video in an attempt to distance themselves from the controversy, Ted released a statement claiming that he was just trying to be a good parent by taking his kids on vacation, the Mexican tourism industry is getting a big shot in the arm thanks to the news coverage, COVID scammers are running wild, Jimmy has a new idea for getting Americans to trust the vaccine, NASA’s Perseverance rover completed its journey to Mars, and an exclusive interview with Ted Cruz! If you want to pitch in and help those who need it right now in Texas, our local affiliate in Houston, ABC 13, has teamed up with the Houston Food Bank. Just text “ABC13” to 41444. For every $1 donated, 3 meals will be given to those who need them.

SUBSCRIBE to get the latest #Kimmel: http://bit.ly/JKLSubscribe

Watch Mean Tweets: http://bit.ly/KimmelMT10

Some of Kimmel’s most popular comedy bits include “Celebrities Read Mean Tweets,” “Lie Witness News,” “Unnecessary Censorship,” “Halloween Candy YouTube Challenge,” and music videos like “I (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.”

snippet.title: Quando Rondo - Red Eye (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Quando Rondo - 
Stream/Download: 

Subscribe for more official content from Quando Rondo: https://1633.lnk.to/QuandoRondoSubscribe

Follow Quando Rondo
https://facebook.com/QuandoRondo
https://instagram.com/quando_rondo
https://twitter.com/quando_rondo
https://soundcloud.com/quandorondo

A natural talent, Quando Rondo was once a small child, secretly singing in the bathroom as a 9-year-old boy in Savannah, GA. His natural gravitation towards music lead to him to hip-hop; he began recording his fledgling verses on his cell phone. He quickly gained traction online, racking up millions of views on YouTube.

Fittingly, he titled his 2018 mixtape 'Life B4 Fame' with the hopes that things would change for the better once his career really took off. He was right—within two days, his mixtape had amassed more than one million streams on MyMixtapez. Things will only go up from there, and if the snippets from his forthcoming Rich Homie Quando project are any sign, he’s only only getting better with time.

snippet.description:

Tessica opened up about her video of the aftermath going viral and how the sudden fame is affecting her, and she also reveals the celebrities who have reached out to offer their assistance.

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Tiger Woods undergoing surgery for leg injuries after rollover crash in Palos Verdes | KTLA 5 News
snippet.description:
Tiger Woods was hospitalized after a solo-vehicle rollover crash in the Palos Verdes area on Tuesday morning, according to the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department. Woods' manager says the golf star suffered leg injuries and was undergoing surgery Tuesday afternoon.

Watch KTLA 5 News' breaking news coverage on Feb. 23, here. More details: https://ktla.com/news/local-news/tiger-woods-injured-in-rollover-crash-in-rancho-palos-verdes-area-jaws-of-life-used-to-extricate-golfer-from-wreck/ #KTLA #TigerWoods

Watch more Fox News Video: http://video.foxnews.com
Watch Fox News Channel Live: http://www.foxnewsgo.com/

FOX News Channel (FNC) is a 24-hour all-encompassing news service delivering breaking news as well as political and business news. The number one network in cable, FNC has been the most-watched television news channel for 18 consecutive years. According to a 2020 Brand Keys Consumer Loyalty Engagement Index report, FOX News is the top brand in the country for morning and evening news coverage. A 2019 Suffolk University poll named FOX News as the most trusted source for television news or commentary, while a 2019 Brand Keys Emotion Engagement Analysis survey found that FOX News was the most trusted cable news brand. A 2017 Gallup/Knight Foundation survey also found that among Americans who could name an objective news source, FOX News was the top-cited outlet. Owned by FOX Corporation, FNC is available in nearly 90 million homes and dominates the cable news landscape, routinely notching the top ten programs in the genre.

While filming, Charlotte artist and superstar, Da Baby, stops by the Icebox showroom and chops it up with Lil Durk and Lil Baby!

snippet.title: My Parents Turned Out to be Fans of Progress, But It Didn't Help Them
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE https://bitly.su/8qJHMP
#privatediary #animatedstory #animationchannel #realstory #animationstory #lifestory

Hi, everyone, my name is Abigail, and I'm 16 years old. Have you ever noticed how many smart devices surround us these days? Smart cars, smart vacuum cleaners, smart watches. Of course, they are very convenient to have around. But sometimes, smart devices can turn out to be not just useful, but also dangerous. Subscribe to the channel, and I will tell you why you should not entrust your life to technologies.

localized.title: My Parents Turned Out to be Fans of Progress, But It Didn't Help Them
localized.description:
SUBSCRIBE https://bitly.su/8qJHMP
#privatediary #animatedstory #animationchannel #realstory #animationstory #lifestory

Hi, everyone, my name is Abigail, and I'm 16 years old. Have you ever noticed how many smart devices surround us these days? Smart cars, smart vacuum cleaners, smart watches. Of course, they are very convenient to have around. But sometimes, smart devices can turn out to be not just useful, but also dangerous. Subscribe to the channel, and I will tell you why you should not entrust your life to technologies.

snippet.title: Maid Shocked when She Cleaned Hotel Room
snippet.description:
Maid Shocked when She Cleaned Hotel Room
People who work in the hospitality industry know what they deal with every day. But they have no choice other than this. Housekeeping becomes their sole source of income, and such people are pushed to accept what they encounter each day of their service. While some manage their chores with a smile, some walk over the odd and rude behavior of guests. And one hotel maid in Utah has seen it all. She was used to handling impolite guests. And when she encountered something left behind by two guests in one of the suites, she burst into tears and you'll love to see why.
▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂▂

snippet.title: Why We Disappeared for Two Months...
snippet.description:
This was not the video we hoped to come back with... but if it makes the difference in one person's life, then it's worth it. 

Learn more here: http://www.combatcovid19now.com

The bamlanivimab covered by this authorization will be used only by healthcare providers to treat milk to moderate COVID-19 in adults and pediatric patients with positive results of direct SARS-CoV-2 viral testing who are 12 years of age and older weighing at least 40 kg, and who are at high risk for progressing to severe COVID-19 and/or hospitalization.

This EUA is for the use of the unapproved products, casirivimab and imdevimab, to be administered together for the treatment of mild to moderate COVID-19 in adults and pediatric patients (12 years of age and older weighing at least 40kg) with positive results of direct SARS-CoV-2 viral testing, and who are at high risk of progressing to severe COVID-19 and/or hospitalization [see Limitations of Authorized Use].
_

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/AllThingsAdrienne
_

FOLLOW ALL THINGS ADRIENNE: 
Facebook: https://facebook.com/AllThingsAdrienneHoughton
Instagram: https://instagram.com/AllThingsAdrienneHoughton
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AllThingsAH 
_

Adrienne Bailon Houghton shares her #HiLow hacks on going glam without breaking the bank! Tips and tricks for mixing high end and inexpensive pieces in all things beauty, fashion, home décor, and entertaining. Tune in every Tuesday at 10AM PST to watch. #AllThingsAdrienne

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Sevilla 2-3 Borussia Dortmund. Grandioso partido de Erling Haaland con doblete | Champions League
snippet.description: Erling Haaland marcó un doblete y dio una asistencia para el triunfo, de visitante, 3-2 del Borussia Dortmund sobre el Sevilla en el partido de ida de los octavos de final de la UEFA Champions League. El noruego, quien anotó a los minutos 27 y 43, también dio una asistencia. Suso y Luuk de Jong anotaron por los españoles. El partido de vuelta está pautado para el 9 de marzo. #ChampionsLeague #Dortmund #Sevilla | Resumen Sevilla vs Borussia Dortmund

snippet.title: Porto 2-1 Juventus DRAMÁTICO FINAL. Cristiano Ronaldo molesto. Tecatito sobrevive | Champions League
snippet.description: En un final emocionante, Porto logró este miércoles aguantar la ventaja sobre Juventus y se llevó un 2-1 en el partido de ida de los octavos de final de la UEFA Champions League. Un gol de Federico Chiesa en el 82 y una decisión polémica sobre el final del partido en un posible penal sobre Cristiano Ronaldo, dejaron al Porto pidiendo el tiempo. Lo portugueses se habían puesto al frente con goles de Mehdi Taremi y Moussa Marega. Pero sobre el final, el equipo del Tecatito Corona tuvo que sufrir para quedarse con la victoria. Las estadísticas están del lado de la Juve, ya que los últimos 5 equipos en haber perdido el primer partido 1-2 en fase eliminatoria, han todos dado vuelto el marcador en el partido de vuelta. #ChampionsLeague | Porto vs Juventus | Juventus vs Porto

snippet.title: The reason why Piqué and Griezmann insulted each other during Barcelona-PSG | Oh My Goal
snippet.description:
Today, Oh My Goal is looking back on the clash between Gerard Piqué and Antoine Griezmann in the middle of the Barcelona-PSG game.

Gérard Piqué was angry at his teammates for not running enough and for being too high up the pitch. But when PIqué lost his temper, Griezmann told him to be quiet and to calm down.

Things then got tense between the two players leading to a very surprising argument...

---------------------------------------

It's good to hear all kinds of reactions, we'll definitely use your feedback for our next videos. Turn on notifications, if you don't want to miss anything on Oh My Goal - News.
